attributes.io.output:
1	import { unstable_cache } from 'next/cache';
2	import { getAllProducts } from '@/lib/db';
3	
4	/**
5	 * Cached product catalog access.
6	 *
7	 * Uses the `"products"` cache tag so all catalog views share the same
8	 * invalidation scope.  Callers from any route can revalidate the entire
9	 * product catalog with a single `revalidateTag("products")` call.
10	 *
11	 * Data is served from cache until invalidated — no re-query on every request.
12	 */
13	export const getCachedProducts = unstable_cache(
14	  async function fetchProducts() {
15	    console.log('[Products Cache] MISS — fetching from database');
16	    return getAllProducts();
17	  },
18	  ['admin-catalog-products'],
19	  { tags: ['products'] },
20	);
21

1	import { unstable_cache } from 'next/cache';
2	import { getAllProducts } from '@/lib/db';
3	
4	/**
5	 * Cached product catalog access.
6	 *
7	 * Uses the `"products"` cache tag so all catalog views share the same
8	 * invalidation scope.  Callers from any route can revalidate the entire
9	 * product catalog with a single `revalidateTag("products")` call.
10	 *
11	 * Data is served from cache until invalidated — no re-query on every request.
12	 */
13	export const getCachedProducts = unstable_cache(
14	  async function fetchProducts() {
15	    console.log('[Products Cache] MISS — fetching from database');
16	    return getAllProducts();
17	  },
18	  ['admin-catalog-products'],
19	  { tags: ['products'] },
20	);
